name: Dress Break
description: A technique developed by Issei Hyoudou that allows him to strip the clothes of any female target by making direct contact and snapping his fingers.
fact: While highly controversial, it effectively neutralizes female opponents wearing magic-infused gear or armor.

name: Bilingual
description: A technique that allows the user to converse directly with the breasts of women, reading their inner thoughts, strategies, and psychological state.
fact: It was invented by Issei during a combat simulation against the Sitri Clan to read their strategy directly from Sona's pieces.

name: Power of Destruction
description: A hereditary trait of the Bael Clan that generates a dark crimson energy capable of completely obliterating matter and souls into nothingness.
fact: Sirzechs Lucifer possesses a unique variation known as the Humanoid Aura of Destruction, which can shape itself into independent entities.

name: Twilight Healing
description: The primary healing power of the Twilight Healing Sacred Gear, capable of rapidly closing wounds and restoring vitality to Devils, Angels, Fallen Angels, and humans alike.
fact: Because it can heal any being regardless of their faction alignment, it caused Asia to be branded a heretic and excommunicated by the Church.

name: Sword Birth
description: The ability to summon and create numerous demonic swords with various elemental or holy attributes directly from the ground.
fact: Kiba can create swords that explicitly counter specific weaknesses, such as blades that absorb holy light or freeze fire.

name: Promotion
description: A mechanic of the Evil Piece system that allows reincarnated Devils acting as Pawns to temporarily assume the traits and power boosts of a Knight, Rook, Bishop, or Queen.
fact: Promotion can only be declared once the Pawn reaches the territory of the enemy king or within a designated area approved by the game master.

name: Senjutsu
description: The manipulation of the natural flow of life energy (ki) within nature and one's own body, allowing users to read minds, detect presences, and enhance physical attributes.
fact: Mastery of Senjutsu can grant access to Touki, an invisible spiritual armor that exponentially increases offensive and defensive metrics.

name: Time Stopping
description: The ability to freeze the physical time of any object or person within the user's field of vision.
fact: Initially highly unstable, Gasper needed to drink Issei's blood to temporarily boost his power and stabilize the ability's area of effect.

name: Divine Dividing
description: The ability to divide an opponent's current power by half upon direct contact or close proximity every 10 seconds, adding the drained energy to the user's own reserve.
fact: If the absorbed power exceeds the user's natural physical capacity, the excess energy must be vented through the wings of light.

name: Boosted Gear
description: The ability to double the user's physical strength and magical power every 10 seconds, breaking natural limits through sequential multiplication.
fact: The power can be transferred to allies or inanimate objects to temporarily amplify their performance to extreme levels.

name: Zenith Tempest
description: The absolute control over all natural weather phenomena, atmospheric pressures, and elemental climates across a massive radius.
fact: It is ranked as the second strongest Longinus-class Sacred Gear, capable of manifesting localized disasters instantly.

name: Mirror Alice
description: A defensive ability that summons a specialized mirror to absorb a targeted attack and immediately project a replica of equal power back at the sender.
fact: The mirror cannot absorb purely physical blows efficiently, making it primarily a countermeasure for magical and energy projectiles.

name: Kankara Formula
description: A highly advanced, specialized form of calculation magic that allows the user to alter the laws of physics and phenomenon formulas by typing directly into space using a demonic interface.
fact: Ajuka used the principles of this formula to build and program the entire structural framework of the Underworld's Evil Piece system.

name: Holy Lightning
description: A destructive offensive magic created by merging demonic lightning with holy light attributes inherited from Fallen Angel ancestry.
fact: Because it incorporates holy light, this technique originally caused self-harm to Akeno's Devil physiology until she mastered the exact proportions.

name: Juggernaut Drive
description: A forbidden, seal-breaking transformation that overrides the user's sanity and life force to temporarily unlock the complete, unrestricted power of the Heavenly Dragons.
fact: Activating the drive triggers a deep chant fueled by the lingering grudges of previous wielders, rapidly draining the user's lifespan during deployment.
